name: AI research assistant with Exa and Claude
description: A private AI research assistant that takes a topic, searches for relevant sources via Exa, uses Claude for deep analysis and synthesis, and posts a comprehensive research summary to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Private & local Ollama self-hosted AI assistant

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

topic.description: The research topic or question to investigate

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the research summary

numResults.description: Number of Exa search results to fetch

steps.name: Search for research sources via Exa
Build Claude prompt for deep research analysis
Run Claude AI for research analysis
Build Slack Block Kit research report
